title: Chapter 2079: Meeting Bai Xutao Again(2)
content:
Chapter 2079: Meeting Bai Xutao Again(2)

When Bai Xutao saw Yuan, his eyebrows immediately raised in a puzzled manner. Bai Ning made it sound like they knew each other, but he was certain that he’d never seen Yuan before in his life.

His gaze slowly shifted to Feng Yuxiang, whose beauty caught his attention. However, he didn’t immediately recognize her, as Feng Yuxiang’s aura and scent had changed drastically since she awakened her bloodline and got rid of the curse.

Noticing Bai Xutao’s lustful gaze on her body, Feng Yuxiang had the urge to strangle him to death, but controlled herself.

"What are you doing? Greet the esteemed guest," Bai Ning suddenly spoke.

"Uh... I greet... um... who are you?" Bai Xutao couldn’t help himself and asked.

Bai Ning snapped her head to glare at him with a threatening gaze, even clenching her fists in anger. After all, she’d given Yuan’s name to him before they arrived.

However, Yuan spoke before she could act, "It’s only been a few years and you’ve already forgotten about me, old friend?"

"A few years?" Bai Xutao became even more confused, as he’d spent the last few years training inside the Heavenly White Tiger Clan’s territory and hadn’t met any new individuals.

Yuan calmly nodded before leaving his seat to approach Bai Xutao.

Then, using voice transmission, Yuan spoke to Bai Xutao, "Have you already forgotten about our time together in the Third Heaven? How you were utterly humiliated by me?"

Bai Xutao’s face twisted in horror, his eyes wide with shock and disbelief. Without a moment’s hesitation, he instinctively unleashed his cultivation and launched an attack at Yuan.

"Y-You?!" Bai Ning gasped, her voice laced with fear. She was so stunned by his action that her body refused to move.

Yuan calmly raised his hand, intercepting Bai Xutao’s strike with a single motion. His fingers closed around the fist, halting the attack effortlessly.

"W-What?!" Bai Xutao’s eyes widened in disbelief.

He tried to pull away, but no matter how much strength he used, his hand wouldn’t budge from Yuan’s grasp. It was like being caught in an unbreakable vice.

"What is the meaning of this, Bai Xutao, you little bastard?!"

Bai Ning finally snapped out of her daze. In a flash, she appeared beside Bai Xutao, seizing him by the neck and yanking him away. Yuan released his grip without resistance, allowing her to drag him away.

"If you don’t have a good explanation, I’ll snap your neck where I stand!" she roared.

"W-Wait! Why are you helping him?! He’s the one who attacked me in the lower heavens!" Bai Xutao exclaimed.

"Bullshit!" Bai Ning didn’t believe him even for a second. "That masked individual had the scent of a dragon! Tian Yang here is clearly a human! Also, he was only a Spirit King a few years ago!"

Bai Xutao’s gaze suddenly landed on Feng Yuxiang, and his eyes widened with realization. He then pointed at her and shouted, "T-That’s the phoenix who offended me in the lower heavens! I’m sure you met her, too!"

Bai Ning turned to look at Feng Yuxiang and frowned. However, she couldn’t believe it.

"Nonsense! That phoenix was nowhere near the realm of True Immortal! Her scent is also different!"

"Young Master, may I?" Feng Yuxiang suddenly stepped forward and asked.

Yuan calmly nodded, "Go ahead. He’s all yours."

"What?" Bai Ning raised her eyebrows in confusion. However, before she could even ask, Feng Yuxiang shot forward like a bolt of lightning, seizing Bai Xutao by the face. With a single, fluid motion, she tore him from Bai Ning’s grasp and slammed his body into the wall with bone-rattling force.

Bai Xutao coughed up a mouthful of blood, though his injuries weren’t anything serious.

However, Feng Yuxiang didn’t stop there. She yanked him away from the wall, only to slam his face into it again—relentlessly, over and over—until the entire wall crumbled beneath the repeated blows.

"So you enjoy bullying the weak and preying on women, huh?!" Feng Yuxiang snarled. "Today, I’ll return the favor—for me and for Xi Meili—and turn you into a roasted tiger!"

With a burst of fiery laughter, she hurled Bai Xutao’s body into the next wall, shaking the entire house.

"Senior Tian Yang..." Bai Ning turned to look at Yuan for answers.

"What’s wrong?" Yuan asked with a nonchalant expression on his face.

"I understand that you’re upset he attacked you, but can you tell her to calm down? I’ll make sure he recieves the proper punishment," she said. "It won’t be a good look on our clan if we let outsiders harm our members... whether they deserve it or not."

"..."

After a moment of silence, Yuan sighed, "That is what’s wrong with the current Heavenly White Tiger Clan. You guys have fallen too much."

"What are you...?"

"Bai Xutao has harmed so many people, causing irreparable damage to your clan’s image and reputation. Yet, you continue to protect him like he’s some priceless treasure. Why? Because he has a miniscule amount of your ancestor’s blood in him? How pathetic."

Yuan stared at Bai Ning’s dumbfounded face with a calm expression as he continued, "I’m sure you know what happened to your ancestor because of his unruly behavior. If your ancestor can be punished, then what about Bai Xutao? Are you trying to say that he’s even more important than your ancestor?"

"I..." Bai Ning gritted her teeth and clenched her fists in frustration.

"Even if I want to punish him, I do not have that authority. Only our Clan Head can make such a decision."

One of the reasons Bai Ning treated Bai Xutao so harshly was because it was all she could do. Any further, and their father would undoubtedly punish her. Although she was the clan’s top genius and held more status than Bai Xutao at the moment, her bloodline was still inferior to his, and that was what truly mattered.

"That’s just an excuse. A poor one, at that." Yuan shook his head.

Meanwhile, Feng Yuxiang’s relentless beating of Bai Xutao had grown so intense that the entire guest house collapsed under the pressure.
